## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No actionable exploit step-by-step instructions included
- [ ] All new corpus entries include `epistemic_status` and `citations` fields
- [ ] Security-related content is defensive-focused only
- [ ] Generated content is not auto-committed (user must explicitly invoke with `--commit`)
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Safety Policy](SAFETY.md)
